hampi_3.summary: A 3-day deep dive into the UNESCO World Heritage site of Vijayanagara ruins, coracle rides, and hippie island vibes.

stops.name: Virupaksha Temple
stops.description: The oldest functioning temple in Hampi, dedicated to Lord Shiva.
stops.insiderTip: Watch the temple elephant Lakshmi take a bath in the Tungabhadra river at 7:30 AM.

stops.name: Mango Tree Restaurant
stops.description: Legendary haunt for travelers, serving great thalis and continental food.

stops.name: Matanga Hill
stops.description: Highest point in Hampi, offering a panoramic view of the ruins.
stops.insiderTip: Start climbing at least 45 mins before sunset.

stops.name: Vittala Temple
stops.description: Home to the iconic Stone Chariot and musical pillars.
stops.insiderTip: Take the electric buggies from the parking spot.

stops.name: Coracle Ride
stops.description: Traditional round boat ride on the Tungabhadra river.
stops.insiderTip: Negotiate the price if you are a group.

stops.name: Anjanadri Hill
stops.description: Birthplace of Lord Hanuman, involves a 575-step climb.
stops.insiderTip: Keep your bags closed; monkeys are very active here.

transport.details: Overnight KSRTC sleeper and local auto rickshaws

accommodation.details: Guest house in Hampi Bazaar or homestay on Hippie Island

food.details: Mix of cafe food and local stalls

entryFees.details: Main temple complex and ASI monuments

savingTips: Walk between the ruins in the Royal Center

travelTips: The ruins involve a lot of walking, stay hydrated.
Alcohol is restricted in the main ruins area.
warnings: Dehydration is common. Carry at least 2L of water.

coorg_2.summary: Refresh your soul in the 'Scotland of India' with spice estates, waterfalls, and Kodava culture.

stops.name: Raja's Seat
stops.description: Garden with a stunning view of Coorg's hills.
stops.insiderTip: Visit early to see the mist lifting over the valley.

stops.name: Abbey Falls
stops.insiderTip: Wear shoes with good grip; it can be slippery.

foodHighlights.whySpecial: Iconic Kodava pork curry with Kachampuli vinegar.

savingTips: Rent a scooter for ₹500/day to save on taxi costs
Eat at local messes instead of luxury resorts

travelTips: Mobile network is spotty in some estates.
Plan your travel before 7 PM as most roads are isolated.
warnings: Roads are winding, carry motion sickness medicine if needed.

gokarna_3.summary: A perfect blend of spirituality and seaside relaxation across five major beaches.

savingTips: Walk the beach trek trail instead of taking boat taxis.

travelTips: Carry cash, as many shacks don't accept cards.
warnings: Swim only in designated safe areas.
